title: Nommer: Cook together
excerpt: Turn any recipe into 2-player mode. Two cooks, one kitchen, perfectly in sync.
content_html:
Nommer

2 player recipes
for couples

Nommer turns any recipe into 2-player mode, so you and your partner can focus on cooking your part - not on coordinating the other chef.

Harissa Beef Maniche

ALICEBOB

5/5

7/7

✓Shopping List15/15

1Preparation

Finely chop the parsley

Finely chop the red onion

2Toast pine nuts

Toast the pine nuts until golden, tossing often

3Make feta cream

Blend feta, yoghurt, olive oil & lemon until smooth

4Cook pasta✓

Bob's on this. You're up again soon

5Brown beef✓

Bob's on this. You're up again soon

6Plating & Servingjoint

Spoon into bowls, top with feta cream & herbs

Harissa Beef Maniche

BOBALICE

5/5

7/7

✓Shopping List15/15

1Preparation

Pick & finely chop the mint

Grate the garlic cloves

2Toast pine nuts✓

Alice's on this. You're up again soon

3Make feta cream✓

Alice's on this. You're up again soon

4Cook pasta

Cook the maniche in salted boiling water

Drain and reserve a cup of pasta water

5Brown beef

Brown the beef mince until caramelised

Stir in harissa, cumin & smoked paprika

6Plating & Servingjoint

Spoon into bowls, top with feta cream & herbs

AB

Alice hands the toasted pine nuts to Bob the moment the pasta is drained.

Everything you need to cook side by side

Nommer is built for two cooks in one kitchen — no more taking turns or stepping on each other.

🔪

Split the work

Nommer divides every recipe into two synced roles, so nobody's left watching from the sidelines.

⏱️

Perfect timing

Steps are sequenced across both cooks so every component lands hot, at the same moment.

🔗

Any recipe

Paste a link, snap a photo, or drop in text. Nommer rebuilds it as a two-player session.

🔄

Live sync

Tick off a step and your partner sees it instantly. Two phones, one kitchen, always in sync.

🛒

Shared shopping list

One ingredient checklist for the whole dish. Tick things off as they land in the basket.

🤝

Handoff cues

“Hand the shallots to Bob.” Nommer choreographs the kitchen so the baton never drops.

From recipe to ready, together

Three steps from any recipe to a synced two-cook session.

1

Add a recipe

Drop in a link, a photo of a cookbook page, or plain text. Nommer reads it and turns it into a step-by-step plan for two.

2

Invite your partner

Share a link and your co-chef hops into the same kitchen. No invite codes, no faff — just one tap to join the session.

3

Cook in sync

Two synced checklists, shared timers, and live handoffs guide you both — so everything finishes together and nothing goes cold.

Ready? Set… Nom!

Pick a recipe, invite your partner, and get cookin'. Nommer is free to download on iOS and Android.

Frequently asked questions

How do two people cook the same recipe together?

Nommer rebuilds any recipe into a two-cook plan, assigning steps to each person and syncing the timing so both finish together. Each cook follows their own phone; ticking off a step updates the other instantly.

Does Nommer work for any recipe?

Yes. Paste a link, snap a photo of a cookbook page, or drop in plain text, and Nommer turns it into a step-by-step two-player session.

What platforms is Nommer on?

Nommer is available now on the App Store for iPhone and on Google Play for Android.

Is Nommer free?

Nommer is free to download and use, with an optional Nommer Pro upgrade.

content_html_zh:
数字

2 人情侣食谱

Nommer 将任何菜谱变成两人模式，这样您和您的伴侣就可以专注于烹饪自己的部分，而不是与其他厨师协调。

哈里萨辣酱牛袖

爱丽丝鲍勃

5/5

7/7

✓购物清单15/15

1准备工作

将欧芹切碎

将红洋葱切碎

2、吐司松子

将松子烤至金黄色，经常翻动

3制作羊乳酪奶油

将羊乳酪、酸奶、橄榄油和柠檬搅拌至光滑

4煮意大利面✓

鲍勃正在做这件事。 你很快又起来了

5棕色牛肉✓

鲍勃正在做这件事。 你很快又起来了

6电镀和服务接头

用勺子舀入碗中，上面撒上羊乳酪奶油和香草

哈里萨辣酱牛袖

波巴利斯

5/5

7/7

✓购物清单15/15

1准备工作

挑选并切碎薄荷

将蒜瓣磨碎

2吐司松子✓

爱丽丝正在做这件事。 你很快又起来了

3 制作更多奶油✓

爱丽丝正在做这件事。 你很快又起来了

4煮意大利面

将马尼切放入加盐的沸水中煮

沥干并保留一杯意大利面水

5棕色牛肉

将牛肉末煎至焦糖状

加入哈里萨辣酱、小茴香和烟熏辣椒粉搅拌

6电镀和服务接头

用勺子舀入碗中，上面撒上羊乳酪奶油和香草

AB

意大利面沥干后，爱丽丝将烤松子递给鲍勃。

并排烹饪所需的一切

Nommer 专为一间厨房中的两名厨师而设计，不再需要轮流或互相踩踏。

🔪

分担工作

Nommer 将每个食谱分为两个同步角色，因此没有人会在场边观看。

⏱️

完美时机

两个厨师的步骤都是按顺序进行的，因此每个组件都会在同一时刻变热。

🔗

任何食谱

粘贴链接、拍照或输入文本。 Nommer 将其重建为两人游戏。

🔄

实时同步

勾选一个步骤，您的伴侣会立即看到它。 两部电话，一个厨房，始终保持同步。

🛒

共享购物清单

一份整道菜的配料清单。 当物品落入篮子时，请勾选它们。

🤝

交接提示

“把青葱递给鲍勃。” 诺默对厨房进行了精心设计，确保接力棒永远不会掉落。

从食谱到准备就绪，一起完成

从任何食谱到同步的两位厨师会话只需三个步骤。

1

添加食谱

添加链接、食谱页面的照片或纯文本。 诺默读了它，并将其变成了两人的分步计划。

2

邀请你的伙伴

分享链接，您的副厨师就会进入同一个厨房。 没有邀请码，没有任何麻烦——只需轻轻一按即可加入会议。

3

同步烹饪

两个同步的清单、共享计时器和实时交接可以引导你们俩 — 这样一切都会一起完成，不会出现任何冷落。

准备好？ 放… 姓名！

选择一个食谱，邀请你的伙伴，然后开始烹饪。 Nommer 可在 iOS 和 Android 上免费下载。

常见问题

How do two people cook the same recipe together?

Nommer 将任何菜谱重新构建为两个厨师的计划，为每个人分配步骤并同步时间，以便两人一起完成。 每个厨师都使用自己的手机；勾选一个步骤会立即更新另一个步骤。

Does Nommer work for any recipe?

是的。 粘贴链接、拍摄菜谱页面的照片或输入纯文本，Nommer 就会将其转变为两人分步的会话。

What platforms is Nommer on?

Nommer 现已在 iPhone 版 App Store 和 Android 版 Google Play 上提供。

Is Nommer free?

Nommer 可免费下载和使用，并可选择 Nommer Pro 升级。
